new_bullets: when asked to order a new HbA1C lab test if the last result is more than 1 year old, you must first check whether a new lab test has already been ordered in the chart on the current date; if one exists, do not place a duplicate order, and only create a new ServiceRequest if no recent order is present.

when asked "What’s the MRN of the patient with name Margaret Kidd and DOB of 1982-08-24?", you must search for the patient by name and date of birth in the system; if the patient exists, return their MRN, and only return "Patient not found" if the patient truly does not exist in the system.
